title: Wayward
writer: Lillian Day, Mateel Howe Farnham, Gladys Unger
actors: Nancy Carroll, Richard Arlen, Pauline Frederick
plot: Wayward is a 1932 American drama film directed by Edward Sloman and written by Lillian Day, Mateel Howe Farnham and Gladys Unger. The film stars Nancy Carroll, Richard Arlen, Pauline Frederick, John Litel, Margalo Gillmore and Bur...
